scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:mobile:web: cd artifacts/myhomebase && BASE_PATH=/ VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://gotohomebase.com pnpm run build
scripts.build:mobile:ios: pnpm run build:mobile:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:mobile:android: pnpm run build:mobile:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:mobile: pnpm run build:mobile:web && npx cap sync ios && npx cap sync android
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
